title: Net revenue per customer (after refunds)
prompt: Net revenue = completed order amounts minus refunded order amounts. For each customer with at least one completed order, return their name and net_revenue, highest first (break ties by name).

generic: SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 'completed' THEN o.amount ELSE 0 END)
- SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 'refunded' THEN o.amount ELSE 0 END) AS net_revenue
JOIN orders o ON o.customer_id = c.customer_id
HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN o.status = 'completed' THEN o.amount ELSE 0 END) > 0

hints: Use conditional sums: SUM(CASE WHEN status=… THEN amount ELSE 0 END) for each status.
Net = completed sum − refunded sum; keep only customers whose completed sum > 0.
